creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #7)

You misunderstood the history. This PR is closed since it is being considered to be added in bash-completion-freebsd then (see comment #1).

As I said in comment #3, I do not want to make this port more complicated, therefore I won't add that file to this port.

For now, given that sysutils/openzfs provides the zfs completion, I believe you should first contact sysutils/openzfs maintainer to split it to a new port. After that, I could add ZFS option and set RUN_DEPENDS to that port (just like bash-completion-freebsd and FREEBSD option).

I'd like to close this PR now. Another PR to add ZFS option can be submitted when the new port land.
